resources.string: Hooks Xiaomi back gesture behavior with LSPosed API 102.

This setting opts selected apps into the complete predictive-back protocol. Single-activity apps, WebViews, Compose Navigation, and custom routers may handle in-app back incorrectly and return directly to Home. Enable it only for apps you have tested.
Changes apply after the target app is fully restarted. No target app is hooked. Apps that already declare app-level predictive-back support are omitted from the list.
LSPosed service is unavailable, so the selection cannot be read or changed. The running hook keeps its last valid configuration.
Could not read the LSPosed configuration. The list is read-only; the running hook keeps its last valid configuration.
Could not save the selection. The previous configuration is unchanged.
Could not load the installed app list.
Saved selection; app is currently unavailable
